description: Introduction to the Solana Learn pathway, a collaboration between Figment and Solana Labs, aimed at developers interested in Web 3.0. The session covers the features of Figment Learn, including documentation, tutorials, and pathways for launching smart contracts. Participants can also receive tokens to start their development journey.
topic_summary: Kickoff of the Solana Learn pathway, detailing how developers can utilize Figment Learn for Web 3.0 development, including tutorials and token incentives for starting on Solana [t=0:00-3:38].
